name_en: .24B Tank Backpack & Large Size Olive Green
name_cn:
.24B Tank Backpack & Large Size Olive Green
The new 24B Duma explosive pack is here!
✨This time it's the 24B Tank Backpack Large Size, caviar champagne gold buckle paired with olive green, like a shining star on the fashion battlefield. Every new Duma release this season has been stunning, from retro styles to material and color variations, the 23K duma is fully upgraded! It's like a Transformer, last season it was a "little frog", now it has transformed into a super cool explosive pack. Low center of gravity, three side pockets, substantial and classic, perfectly blending vintage charm with stunning wearability
👜 Caviar champagne gold buckle, lychee grain ball texture material, durable and wear-resistant, like wearing a sturdy armor. Great for hand-carry or backpacking, perfect for styling, making you an instant fashion focal point. Plus, high-saturation colors integrated into the classic duma backpack, full of vitality, combining cuteness and fashion, like a light illuminating your fashion path, come get yours!
Size: 21.5*19.5*12cm
A
